items: Most art assets still outstanding after the native-3D rework
Mission content beyond the first playable

barRaise.topFinding: The 2026-07-04 leftovers pass (v0.99.31) closed both YaE brand-consistency findings (sub-page now pitches native 3D, pills at v0.99.x) and the work-queue-hygiene finding (queue pruned, 42 live), and weighted health ticks 87 to 88. Two HBH-repo items did not close: CLAUDE.md:58 still reads 'new 2D assets ... Midjourney' despite the note recording a v0.99.29 fix (solo-dev-voice-portfolio stays open), and the 2026-07-05 canonical audit re-confirmed four save_load GDD drift spots presenting a retired autoload as live (:2084,:4651-4652,:4726,:4841), now re-tracked as queue item hbh-gdd-saveload-structural-refs-2026-07-05. Both are attended-session GDD/handler edits. The two cross-project automation items (queue-drain field mismatch, bar-raise missed-window catch-up) carry forward and cannot be cleared from an HBH-scoped session. All hard rules pass (GDD ends </html>, colorblind_mode declared once, pills lockstep at 0.99.31); no BLOCK. All four long-standing tensions sit at runsSeen 6+ and should be promoted to GDD Locked Decisions via adr-promoter.

actions.title: Fix the four save_load GDD drift spots (two <tr> deletions at :4651-4652 and :4841, two prose rewrites at :2084 and :4726) so the doc stops presenting the retired autoload as live.
Neutralize the Midjourney reference and 'new 2D assets' tagline in the GitHub-visible CLAUDE.md asset-workflow section (CLAUDE.md:58).
Fix the queue-drain-4h triage to read 'added' instead of 'addedAt' so staleness triage fires.
Add a missed-window catch-up to the bar-raise-hbh routine so a closed-app gap self-heals.

deferred.title: Pick the animated-vs-instanced crowd render path: the v0.99.30 re-baseline shows animated Zombie1 at 26 fps at 1k enemies (17x heavier than the static runner), so the per-Node animated path cannot reach the S-34 hundreds-to-thousands target.
deferred.reason: owner look-decision (animated per-Node near-camera vs static-instanced crowd3d vs batched skeletal shader); the use_crowd3d A/B seam is now genuinely wired (v0.99.31) so the decision is measurable; wave caps hold practical counts in the low hundreds meanwhile

deferred.title: Add a SAVE_VERSION migration dispatch and an older-format fixture test.
deferred.reason: no incompatible SAVE_VERSION bump yet; migration path premature pre-M4-lock, and the live save is atomic as of v0.99.28

deferred.title: Replace the ~14 placeholder colored-box buildings with finished models.
deferred.reason: remaining building models are art-delivery-gated (same gate as M4)

deferred.title: Sweep the residual Midjourney/Tripo tool names from the GDD changelog body.
deferred.reason: batch-2 voice sweep + check_gdd_voice.py ratchet cover genuine third-person/reader-address tells; the residual tool names are factual asset-pipeline documentation a solo dev would legitimately keep

deferred.title: Re-scope M4 to separate the shipped engineering track from the art-and-mission gate.
deferred.reason: blocked on art/mission delivery; metric-honesty re-scope, not a kill signal

barRaise.actionsClearedNote: 2026-07-05 full pass: verified the 2026-07-04 leftovers closures on disk (YaE sub-page native-3D copy + v0.99.x pills, work queue pruned to 42 live) and closed brand-consistency-01/02 + work-queue-hygiene-01. Two HBH-repo items remain open: solo-dev-voice-portfolio-01 (CLAUDE.md:58 still carries the stale Midjourney/2D-assets line despite the note claiming a v0.99.29 fix) and the newly-surfaced save_load GDD drift (gdd-saveload-doc-drift-01, tracked as hbh-gdd-saveload-structural-refs-2026-07-05). Both are attended GDD/handler edits. The two cross-project automation items carry forward for the orchestration owner.
